race.comment: PACKERS JOURNEY (10) has a moderate winning strike-rate but performed well last time at Ballarat Synthetic, finishing fourth and only 1.5 lengths from the winner at the end of 1200m when she did her best work late. Best figures measure up. BRULLEN (3) is a last-start winner over 1500m at Ballarat Synthetic, showing good early speed on the occasion and leading throughout to score by a nose. Commendable record at this trip with a win and five minor placings and has solid claims. MR MARKLE (2) saluted at Casterton two runs ago. Decent effort last time out when third over 1000m at Ballarat Synthetic, beaten 2.5 lengths. Likely improver with strong prospects.  FORMIDABLE FORCE (1) will be better for the run and has a lot of weight but boasts the best last-start performance in the race. OWL WITNESS (9) was well beaten in stronger company two starts back then found a better race last time and scored by 1.5 lengths over 1200m at Ballarat Synthetic.
